failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: rolling train-only score surface selecting intraday US100 M5 candidates by score-conditioned schedule
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0002 run must change a meaningful score/model/feature/label/trade surface, not nudge thresholds or reuse R0001 as-is
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: all 9 fold-isolated MT5 tick folds were losing and no profitable fold was observed

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether a rolling train-only score surface can rank closed-bar US100 M5 candidate events into a tradable subset with approximately 5 to 10 entries per active day before any equity-percent sizing
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: first C0002 true variant; changes the selection mechanism from C0001 deterministic regime-response rules to score-conditioned candidate ranking, not a threshold nudge, repair, retry, or adjacent tuning of C0001

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
proxy must train or fit score surfaces only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report score diagnostics with applies true
proxy must target entry frequency diagnostics around 5 to 10 entries per active day without treating the target as a selected gate
mechanical parity must compare candidate timestamps, score-filtered entries, direction, exits, and lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

repair_records.summary: Skipped proxy entries when the next entry bar is separated from the signal bar by more than one M5 interval; MT5 rejected those gap-carried entries with trade retcode 10018.

feature.summary: closed-bar reproducible features for recent return, range, volatility state, session context, momentum persistence, pullback depth, and prior bar path context; no feature set selected

label.summary: train-only candidate quality label based on forward path quality such as favorable excursion versus adverse excursion over a fixed closed-bar horizon; no label selected

model.summary: rolling-window train-only score surface for candidate event quality; initial family may be transparent linear/logistic/rank scoring but no model family or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: generate broad closed-bar candidate events, rank them by score, trade a fixed-lot subset near the 5 to 10 entries-per-active-day target, and evaluate exits without claiming final runtime sizing
